tried.name: full RBTAD
tried.result: 0.20 on 10-trial Spatial-LT; rejected due head/mid collapse

tried.name: rare-only/tail-anchor
tried.result: 0.09-0.24 range; rejected due collateral drift and unsolved extreme tails

tried.name: staged-tail 800+200 and 900+100
tried.result: 0.24 and 0.26 on 10-trial; useful but not stable

tried.name: RSDF vision+LLM
tried.result: seed7 matched 30-trial 0.25 vs baseline 0.19, but seed13 0.18 vs baseline 0.17; useful diagnostic but not reliable final method

tried.name: SPRC full-parameter L2-SP correction
tried.result: seed7 10-trial 0.17 and seed13 0.13; rejected because weight protection alone does not fix harmful correction samples

tried.name: CGRBC confusion-gated rare BC
tried.result: seed7 10-trial 0.26 but seed13 0.10; rejected as unstable despite active TCAD/tail gate

tried.name: CGRBC 5-step corrective pulse
tried.result: seed7 0.19 and seed13 0.13; rejected because conservative correction preserves little and does not lift

tried.name: RLCT LLM-only relation-localized correction
tried.result: seed7 0.17 and seed13 0.18; rejected because freezing non-LLM parameters is too restrictive

tried.name: Behavior-Preserving Corrective Distillation
tried.result: next structural direction; not yet run

tried.name: Tail-Focal BC
tried.result: seed7 10-trial 0.15 and seed13 0.19; rejected as unstable despite finite tail_focal_loss and tail_hit_count>0 in smoke/full correction debug

tried.name: Tail Action-Gain diagnostic
tried.result: next experiment: evaluation-time causal diagnostic for rollout-observed low action norm; not a final method unless it shows robust matched gains

next_structural_direction: Run a causal rollout-action diagnostic before implementing heavier rollout-state correction. Do not continue offline TCAD/focal variants unless the diagnostic supports action norm as causal.
